title: 808 Sleigh Ride
lyrics:
The holiday countdown starts now, can you hear the rhythm call? Snow falling outside the window, we're not waiting for Santa at all. Lights are flashing, bass is thumping, a dance break under the disco ball. Get ready, everyone, we're gonna give this night our all!
Baby, 메리 크리스마스! This feeling is so right. Our love is brighter than the 별빛 (starlight) tonight. Hands up high, yeah, we're flying, don't stop the 리듬. The best gift is this party, you and me, 'til the morning comes!
하나, 둘, 셋, 넷, drop the beat, let's go! This winter miracle is a moment we'll never let go.

I see you across the room, my 산타 베이비. Your style is so fresh, everything about you is maybe... My perfect match in this cold 겨울. Every beat drop makes the moment go faster.
This feeling is real, it's not a dream, I'm caught in the light of your holiday gleam. Turn the music up, yeah, make it loud, Let's shout our love to the whole crowd!

Baby, 메리 크리스마스! This feeling is so right. Our love is brighter than the 별빛 tonight. Hands up high, yeah, we're flying, don't stop the 리듬. The best gift is this party, you and me, 'til the morning comes!

Yo, check the tempo, this is the holiday rhythm. 비트가 터지네, like a firework in the sky. No break, no stop, just pure adrenaline. Put your hands together for the 808 Sleigh Ride!

Wait a minute, look up at the 하늘. Snow falling slow, beneath the dazzling lights. Even in the noise, I only hear your voice. This moment is the magic, the reason we rejoice.
[Climax Build-up - English] Ready for the final beat? Can you feel the heat? One, two, three... DROP!

Baby, 메리 크리스마스! This feeling is so right. Our love is brighter than the 별빛 tonight. Hands up high, yeah, we're flying, don't stop the 리듬. The best gift is this party, you and me, 'til the morning comes!

Woo! Merry Christmas, yeah! The Sleigh Ride is over, but the party never stops!

8-0-8!
